description: 20 high-quality prompt templates for Claude. A ready-to-use collection for code generation, writing, analysis, and more — built for real-world work.

prompts.title: Code Review & Improvement Suggestions
prompts.prompt:
Please review the following code.

```
{{CODE}}
```

Analyze it from the perspectives below and provide improvement suggestions with updated code:
1. Bugs and potential errors
2. Performance improvements
3. Readability and maintainability
4. Security risks
5. Best practice compliance

Assign a priority level (High / Medium / Low) to each issue.
prompts.use_case: Automated code review, pull request checks

prompts.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
prompts.prompt:
Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following function.

```{{LANGUAGE}}
{{FUNCTION_CODE}}
```

Test framework: {{TEST_FRAMEWORK}}

Requirements:
- Happy path tests (multiple patterns)
- Error handling tests (edge cases and exceptions)
- Boundary value tests
- Include mocks/stubs where necessary
- Add descriptive comments to each test
prompts.use_case: Test-driven development, adding tests to legacy code

prompts.title: REST API Endpoint Design & Implementation
prompts.prompt:
Design and implement a REST API endpoint based on the following requirements.

Feature: {{FEATURE_DESCRIPTION}}
Framework: {{FRAMEWORK}}
Language: {{LANGUAGE}}

Please provide:
1. Endpoint definition (method, path, description)
2. Request/response schemas
3. Validation logic
4. Error handling
5. Implementation code
6. curl test examples

prompts.title: SQL Query Optimization
prompts.prompt:
Analyze and optimize the following SQL query.

```sql
{{SQL_QUERY}}
```

Table definitions:
```sql
{{TABLE_SCHEMA}}
```

Current issue: {{PERFORMANCE_ISSUE}}

Please provide:
1. Explanation of the query's problems
2. Optimized query
3. Indexes to add
4. Estimated performance improvement before and after
5. Advice on reading EXPLAIN output

prompts.title: Error Message Analysis & Debugging
prompts.prompt:
Analyze the following error and help me debug it.

Error message:
```
{{ERROR_MESSAGE}}
```

Related code:
```{{LANGUAGE}}
{{CODE}}
```

Environment: {{ENVIRONMENT}}

Please address:
1. Root cause of the error
2. How to fix it (with updated code)
3. Best practices to prevent the same error
4. Other potential related issues

prompts.title: Technical Blog Post Generation
prompts.prompt:
Write a technical blog post for engineers on the following topic.

Topic: {{TOPIC}}
Target audience: {{TARGET_AUDIENCE}}
Approximate length: {{LENGTH}} characters

Structure:
1. Compelling title (3 options)
2. Lead paragraph (hook to engage readers)
3. Body (with headings and code examples)
4. Conclusion
5. Placeholder for reference links

SEO keywords: {{SEO_KEYWORDS}}
prompts.use_case: Running a tech blog, posting on dev platforms

prompts.title: Press Release & Announcement
prompts.prompt:
Write a press release based on the following information.

Announcement: {{ANNOUNCEMENT}}
Company name: {{COMPANY_NAME}}
Release date: {{DATE}}
Contact person: {{CONTACT_PERSON}}

Format:
1. Headline (a strong single sentence)
2. Subheadline
3. Lead paragraph (5W1H)
4. Detailed description (3 paragraphs)
5. Quote (comment from a key spokesperson)
6. Company overview
7. Contact information

Tone: {{TONE}} (e.g., formal / casual)

prompts.title: Business Email Template Generation
Competitive Analysis Report
prompts.prompt:
Provide a framework for analyzing the following competitors and conduct the analysis.

Our product: {{OWN_PRODUCT}}
Competitor list: {{COMPETITORS}}
Analysis dimensions: {{ANALYSIS_DIMENSIONS}}

Analysis content:
1. Feature comparison matrix (table format)
2. Strengths and weaknesses of each competitor
3. Positioning map
4. Our differentiation points
5. Market gaps (opportunities)
6. Threats to address
7. Recommended actions (prioritized)

prompts.title: User Feedback Analysis
prompts.prompt:
Analyze the following user feedback.

Feedback list:
```
{{FEEDBACK_LIST}}
```

Please analyze:
1. Sentiment analysis (ratio of positive / negative / neutral)
2. Categorization of frequent themes and keywords
3. Most critical issues (top 5)
4. Most appreciated aspects (top 5)
5. Improvement suggestions (specific action items)
6. Estimated NPS score with rationale

prompts.title: KPI Dashboard Design
prompts.prompt:
Design a KPI dashboard for the following business objectives.

Business goal: {{BUSINESS_GOAL}}
Phase: {{PHASE}} (e.g., startup / growth / mature)
Available data: {{AVAILABLE_DATA}}

Please provide:
1. Primary KPIs (5–7) with formulas
2. Supporting metrics (classified as Leading / Lagging)
3. Recommended alert thresholds
4. Weekly report template
5. Suggested data collection methods

prompts.title: Risk Analysis Matrix
prompts.prompt:
Conduct a risk analysis for the following project or business.

Project overview: {{PROJECT_DESCRIPTION}}
Stakeholders: {{STAKEHOLDERS}}
Timeline: {{TIMELINE}}

Please analyze:
1. Risk register (probability × impact matrix)
2. Detailed description of each risk
3. Mitigation strategies
4. Contingency plans
5. Proposed risk ownership assignments
6. Monitoring methods

prompts.title: PRD (Product Requirements Document) Template
prompts.prompt:
Create a PRD (Product Requirements Document) for the following idea.

Product name: {{PRODUCT_NAME}}
Idea overview: {{IDEA}}
Target users: {{TARGET_USER}}
Problem being solved: {{PROBLEM}}

PRD contents:
1. Executive summary
2. Problem definition and opportunity
3. Goals and success metrics (OKR format)
4. User stories (5–10)
5. Functional requirements (MVP / Phase 2 classification)
6. Non-functional requirements
7. Out-of-scope items
8. Dependencies and constraints
9. Release criteria

prompts.title: User Interview Question Design
prompts.prompt:
Design a user interview question list to validate the following hypothesis.

Hypothesis to validate: {{HYPOTHESIS}}
Interviewee profile: {{INTERVIEWEE_PROFILE}}
Interview duration: {{DURATION}} minutes

Please design:
1. Opening questions (icebreakers)
2. Current state questions (deep-dive into pain points)
3. Hypothesis validation questions (unbiased format)
4. Solution exploration questions
5. Closing questions
6. Interview facilitation guide
7. Notes sheet template

prompts.title: Landing Page Copy
Social Media Content Calendar Generation
Claude System Prompt Design
Prompt Chain Design
prompts.prompt:
Break down the following complex task into a prompt chain.

Overall task: {{COMPLEX_TASK}}
Input data: {{INPUT_DATA}}
Desired output: {{DESIRED_OUTPUT}}

Please design:
1. Task decomposition diagram (list of steps)
2. Prompt for each step
3. Data handoff method between steps
4. Error checkpoints
5. Identification of steps that can be parallelized
6. Example implementation code (Python)

prompts.title: Meeting Minutes & Summary
prompts.prompt:
Create professional meeting minutes from the following meeting content.

Meeting type: {{MEETING_TYPE}}
Attendees: {{PARTICIPANTS}}
Date and time: {{DATE_TIME}}

Notes and discussion:
```
{{RAW_NOTES}}
```

Please output:
1. Executive summary (3 lines or fewer)
2. Discussion summary by agenda item
3. Decisions made
4. Action items (with owner and deadline)
5. Proposed agenda for next meeting
6. Flag for any confidential items not to be shared (if applicable)
prompts.use_case: More efficient meetings, meeting minutes creation

prompts.title: Automated Weekly Report Generation
prompts.prompt:
Create a weekly report from the following information.

Period: {{WEEK}}
Name: {{NAME}}
Role: {{ROLE}}

This week's activities:
```
{{ACTIVITIES}}
```

Metrics:
```
{{METRICS}}
```

Please create the report with:
1. Highlights of the week (3 points)
2. Accomplishments (vs. KPI targets)
3. Status of in-progress tasks
4. Challenges and blockers
5. Plan for next week
6. Areas where support is needed
7. Learnings and insights

usage_guide.how_to_use: Replace the {{VARIABLE_NAME}} placeholders with your own information and send the prompt to Claude.
tips: The more specific your variable inputs, the higher quality the output will be
If the output is too long, add 'be concise'; if too short, add 'elaborate in more detail'
Following up with additional questions in the same conversation improves quality
Share prompts with your team to standardize workflows
